en: Body cams can seem like a great tool for increasing accountability and building trust,
ko: 바디캠은 책임감을 높이고 신뢰를 쌓는 좋은 도구처럼 보이고, 경찰도 중시해요.

en: and cops themselves tend to value them too, though for slightly different reasons than the rest of us,
ko: 다만 이유가 좀 달라서, 허위 민원을 줄이려는 거죠.

en: as for them, it's more about reducing frivolous or false complaints.
And look, ideally, you could have all of those things.
In fact, as this police captain in Virginia sees it, the best case scenario for body cams
ko: 버지니아 경찰 대위에 따르면, 바디캠의 최상 시나리오는 모든 사람의 행동을 개선하는 거예요.

en: is them improving everyone's behavior. When a camera's present, everyone acts a little bit better.
ko: 그들이 모두의 행동을 개선하고 있어. 카메라가 있으면 모두 조금 더 잘 행동해.

en: So, perhaps this is an opportunity for us to de-escalate an incident.
ko: 카메라가 있으면 모두가 좀 더 잘 행동해요. 상황을 진정시킬 기회가 될 수도 있죠.

en: If something is very, very escalated, um, it'll be a reminder to everyone involved,
to include the officers and the public, that a camera's present, and hopefully that we all
ko: 카메라가 있다는 걸 경찰과 시민 모두에게 상기시켜주고,

en: are acting a little bit better, a little more civil to each other.
ko: 서로 좀 더 예의 바르게 행동하길 바라는 거죠.

en: Well, that certainly sounds nice, doesn't it? Although, when a camera's present,
everyone acts a bit better is an observation for someone who clearly doesn't watch reality TV.
ko: 하지만 카메라 앞에서 다들 잘 행동한다는 건 리얼리티 TV를 안 본 사람의 관찰이에요.

en: A world in which a camera's presence is your cue to throw a glass of pinot grigio into someone's face
ko: 카메라가 있으면 고급 레스토랑에서 피노 그리지오를 상대 얼굴에 끼얹고

en: and call them a whore in the middle of a nice restaurant.
Still, that notion that body cams can be a way of calming down interactions with law enforcement
ko: 그래도 바디캠이 법 집행 상호작용을 진정시킨다는 개념은 매력적이에요.

en: is appealing, and it may be why it seems we're about to slap them on the chest of all ICE agents
ko: 그래서 책임이라는 이름으로 전국 ICE 요원들에게 달려는 것 같고요.

en: across the country in the name of accountability.
But the thing is, the more you look into body cams, the more you realize they are only effective
ko: 하지만 문제는, 바디캠을 들여다볼수록 제대로 사용될 때만 효과가 있다는 걸 알게 되는데,

en: if they are used properly, and in many cases, they are just not.
So, given that tonight, let's talk about body cams.
ko: 그러니 오늘 밤, 바디캠에 대해 이야기합시다.
